This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] RTCEncodedVideoFrame copy construction metadata override on main thread.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "InvalidModificationError: Failed to construct 'RTCEncodedVideoFrame': Cannot create a new VideoFrame: new metadata has member(s) missing."
[FAIL] RTCEncodedAudioFrame copy construction metadata override on main thread.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "InvalidModificationError: Failed to construct 'RTCEncodedAudioFrame': Cannot create a new AudioFrame: Invalid modification of RTCEncodedAudioFrameMetadata. Bad synchronizationSource"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
